name: Shield Level Select 3

data_sources.note: Brighthouse Shield Level Select 3-Year Annuity S-3/A filing (CIK 733076, Brighthouse Life Insurance Company). Three-year buffer RILA variant.

Brighthouse Shield Level Select 3-Year fact card. 6-yr surrender schedule (7/7/6/5/4/3) applies even on 3-year term contracts (contract surrender period, not segment-term-locked). Spec surrender 7/6/5 (3-yr only) was incorrect — updated to prospectus-verified 7/7/6/5/4/3.
Brighthouse Life Insurance Company AM Best FSR A (Excellent). Ratings under review with negative implications since 2025-11-10 pending Aquarian Capital acquisition.

verification_notes: Surrender schedule corrected from 3-yr-only (7/6/5) to prospectus-verified 6-yr Shield contract schedule (7/7/6/5/4/3); AM Best confirmed; 3-yr S&P 500 10% buffer cap retained at 0.25 per public range.
